nasb.text: You have not eaten bread, nor have you drunk wine or strong drink, in order that you might know that I am the Lord your God.

esv.text: You have not eaten bread, and you have not drunk wine or strong drink, that you may know that I am the Lord your God.

cnv.text: 飯你們沒有吃，清酒或烈酒你們沒有喝，這是要使你們知道耶和華是你們的　神。

ccb.text: 你们没有吃饼，也没有喝淡酒和烈酒。这是为了让你们知道耶和华是你们的上帝。
